scenario.name: UAC IP-Based Trunk
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:[caller_id]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[caller_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sipp [call_number] [call_number] IN IP4 [local_ip] s=OLAM Load Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:[caller_id]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: [$1] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[caller_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:[caller_id]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: [$1] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Contact: <sip:[caller_id]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0
